# WINetworkSharingProvider.AccessPointConnection

**Structure**

A Wi-Fi access point the host is currently connected to, which may be shared with a connected accessory.

## Declaration

```swift
struct AccessPointConnection
```

## Structures

- **WINetworkSharingProvider.AccessPointConnection.ID**: An opaque identifier for a given access point.
- **WINetworkSharingProvider.AccessPointConnection.Link**: A data link to a Wi-Fi Access Point.

## Instance Properties

- **description**: A string description of the access point, for debugging purposes.
- **id**: A stable per-access point ID that can be used to uniquely identify this access point. ID will be stable for the lifetime of a given App launch.
- **links**: The set of active data links with the Access Point.
- **ssid**: The access point’s Service Set Identifier (SSID), also known as the network name.

## Getting information about access point connections

- **WINetworkSharingProvider.AccessPointConnectionEvent**: An event that indicates an update to the available shared access points.
- **accessPointConnectionEvents(matching:)**: Returns an async sequence of access point events containing the currently connected access point(s) and future updates.

## Conforms To

- CustomStringConvertible
- Decodable
- Encodable
- Equatable
- Hashable
- Identifiable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
